## Checklist

- [ ] Success criteria defined and met (the change does what it set out to do)
- [ ] `lint`, `build`, and `test` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the changed behavior
- [ ] AI code review run on the diff (`/code-review`) and findings addressed
- [ ] Docs updated under `docs/` if behavior or architecture changed
- [ ] Postmortem added under `docs/postmortems/` if this fixes a bug
- [ ] No secrets committed; scope limited to the stated problem
